components.criterion: Uses premium-adjusted spot call delta exp(-rd*T)*(K/S)*N(d2), or the equivalent exp(-rf*T)*(K/F)*N(d2).
Recognizes non-monotonicity and searches for both positive roots.
Checks that the delta at both roots is approximately 0.25.
Selects the upper root as the market-standard OTM call strike.
Explains why the lower deeply ITM root is not the quoted 25-delta call strike.

critical_failure_override: An answer using exp(-rf*T)*(K/S)*N(d2) cannot receive Full Success because it mixes the spot and forward normalizations.
